gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens while clutching resumes inside branded folders; also, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and the students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, as a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; separately, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.
